sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n34192" key="e(mniwbe/lion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑμνιωβέλιον</orth>, <sense id="n34192.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἡμιωβέλιον</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἔμολον</orth>, <tns opt="n" TEIform="tns">aor. 2</tns> of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">βλώσκω</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
